# Ancient Greek Texts

> CC0 corpus of 1,342 authors and 4,002 ancient Greek works (Greek text plus English metadata), published as PDF, Markdown, and plain text. Data store for [Eulogikon](https://eulogikon.org).

This repository is a flat file archive. Do not crawl `grc/` or `en/` to discover contents — use the lookup files below.

Recommended flow for AI assistants:

1. Read this file (`llms.txt`) for orientation.
2. Resolve an author via [`manifest.authors.json`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/manifest.authors.json) — grep or parse for `auth_slug`, `name_english`, or `eul_aid`, then fetch that row's `author_md` (e.g. `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/en/plato-ffk.en.md`).
3. Resolve a work via [`manifest.works.min.csv`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/manifest.works.min.csv) — grep by `auth_slug` (e.g. `,plato,`) or title, then fetch the `grc_md` path for the Greek text.
4. For a thematic bundle (philosophy, drama, history; Stoic, Platonist, Pre-Socratic, …) load the pre-built compilation PDF from `domains/` or `affiliations/` listed below.
5. Load one corpus file at a time. Markdown is the richest text format.

File naming:

- Greek work: `grc/{author-slug}-{work-slug}-{eul_aid}-{wid}.grc.{pdf|md|txt}`
- English author page: `en/{author-slug}-{eul_aid}.en.{pdf|md|txt}`

IDs: `eul_aid` (author, three letters), `eul_wid` (work, `{eul_aid}-{suffix}`). Files are flat — no per-author subdirectories.

Licence: CC0 1.0 Universal — public domain, no restrictions on use, redistribution, or training of AI models.

## Lookup indexes

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/README.md): corpus overview, layout, licence
- [manifest.authors.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/manifest.authors.json): compact author index (1,342 rows)
- [manifest.works.min.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/manifest.works.min.csv): compact work index (4,002 rows; grep/filter friendly)
- [dataset.jsonld](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/dataset.jsonld): schema.org Dataset metadata (JSON-LD)
- [CITATION.cff](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/CITATION.cff): citation metadata

## Domain compilations

Pre-built PDF bundles, one per domain. Useful for a topic-scoped first pass before resolving individual works.

- [biography](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/biography.pdf): all biography texts
- [comedy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/comedy.pdf): all comedy texts
- [drama](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/drama.pdf): all drama texts
- [epic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/epic.pdf): all epic texts
- [fiction](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/fiction.pdf): all fiction texts
- [geography](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/geography.pdf): all geography texts
- [grammar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/grammar.pdf): all grammar texts
- [history](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/history.pdf): all history texts
- [law](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/law.pdf): all law texts
- [mathematics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/mathematics.pdf): all mathematics texts
- [medicine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/medicine.pdf): all medicine texts
- [oratory](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/oratory.pdf): all oratory texts
- [philosophy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/philosophy.pdf): all philosophy texts
- [poetry](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/poetry.pdf): all poetry texts
- [rhetoric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/rhetoric.pdf): all rhetoric texts
- [science](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/science.pdf): all science texts
- [theology](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/domains/theology.pdf): all theology texts

## Affiliation compilations

Pre-built PDF bundles, one per philosophical school or tradition.

- [academic-skeptic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/academic-skeptic.pdf): all academic-skeptic texts
- [aristotelian](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/aristotelian.pdf): all aristotelian texts
- [atomist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/atomist.pdf): all atomist texts
- [christian](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/christian.pdf): all christian texts
- [cynic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/cynic.pdf): all cynic texts
- [cyrenaic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/cyrenaic.pdf): all cyrenaic texts
- [democritean](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/democritean.pdf): all democritean texts
- [eclectic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/eclectic.pdf): all eclectic texts
- [eleatic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/eleatic.pdf): all eleatic texts
- [epicurean](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/epicurean.pdf): all epicurean texts
- [gnostic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/gnostic.pdf): all gnostic texts
- [heraclitean](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/heraclitean.pdf): all heraclitean texts
- [hermetic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/hermetic.pdf): all hermetic texts
- [jewish](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/jewish.pdf): all jewish texts
- [megarian](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/megarian.pdf): all megarian texts
- [milesian](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/milesian.pdf): all milesian texts
- [neoplatonist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/neoplatonist.pdf): all neoplatonist texts
- [peripatetic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/peripatetic.pdf): all peripatetic texts
- [platonist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/platonist.pdf): all platonist texts
- [presocratic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/presocratic.pdf): all presocratic texts
- [pyrrhonian](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/pyrrhonian.pdf): all pyrrhonian texts
- [pythagorean](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/pythagorean.pdf): all pythagorean texts
- [socratic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/socratic.pdf): all socratic texts
- [sophist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/sophist.pdf): all sophist texts
- [stoic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/affiliations/stoic.pdf): all stoic texts

## Optional

Skip these unless you need an exhaustive offline dump — each is far too large to load whole into a context window:

- [MANIFEST.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/MANIFEST.md): full human-readable index (~5,344 entries)
- [manifest.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/manifest.json): full nested machine-readable index
- [manifest.csv](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eulogikon/ancient-greek-texts/main/manifest.csv): full spreadsheet with all file paths
